'''Eriadu Spaceport''' was the spaceport serving [[Eriadu City/Legends|Eriadu City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]]. Many of the delegates to the [[Eriadu Trade Summit]] including [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]]—and his would-be assassins—landed at the spaceport prior to attending the summit. New arrivals were required to pass through [[Eriadu Customs and Immigration]], and many vessels were subject to search by customs and immigration officials.

{{Struct-stub}}
